artPrompt: A dramatic moment as a searing bolt of flame-orange energy streaks across the feral town square and slams into a recoiling goblin, sparks and embers bursting from the impact in a shower against the night. Rioting silhouettes and overturned ballot boxes scatter in the firelight, torn blank bunting whipping overhead. Mono-red palette of flame orange, ember red, and black smoke, gleeful destructive mayhem, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Attack Ad Blitz
text:
Attack Ad Blitz deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker.
If that permanent is an opponent's commander, also create a 1/1 red Voter creature token, because the negative ads tested really well.
flavorText: "My opponent once returned a library book late. Can we really trust them?"
